title: Limited Warfare
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Limited Warfare''''' was an album by [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]]. It was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

*"[[Bureaucracy Blues]]"

*"[[Desert Starlight]]"

*"[[Limited Warfare (song)|Limited Warfare]]"
*"[[Masslines]]"
